source.purpose: Partial operation-plan updates should merge into the single campaign-level current plan and stamp the update turn.

operationPlan.target: Reach the sealed freight bay under the registry annex.
operationPlan.approach: Enter through the morning intake line.

input.playerInput: If the clerk blocks us, we use the service stair instead.

narrator.prose: If the clerk blocks you, the service stair becomes the route.

changes.approach: Enter through the morning intake line; if blocked, use the service stair.

perTurnDeltaIncludes: - target: Reach the sealed freight bay under the registry annex.
- approach: Enter through the morning intake line; if blocked, use the service stair.
- fallback: Retreat to the loading yard.
